pi_items.source: Task description and setup_task.sh line 37: shortname set to 'CHEM101' for General Chemistry course
Task description explicitly states: 'Custom instance name: Lab Safety Self-Enrollment'. Moodle mdl_enrol.name field stores custom instance names per MDL-72213.

Task description explicitly states: 'Enrollment key: ChemFall2025'. Moodle mdl_enrol.password field stores the enrollment key (self-enrollment gate key). Verified via Moodle documentation on Self enrolment.

Task description explicitly states: 'Maximum enrolled users: 30'. Moodle mdl_enrol.customint3 field stores 'maxenrolled' setting for self-enrollment plugin. Reasonable class size for chemistry lab. Verified via enrol_self plugin source code structure.
Task description explicitly states: 'Enrollment duration: 180 days'. Reasonable duration for full semester course. Consistent with academic calendar.

Mathematical calculation verified: 180 days × 86400 seconds/day = 15,552,000 seconds. Moodle mdl_enrol.enrolperiod field stores duration in seconds (not days). Verified via Moodle course completion FAQ.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring self-enrollment for course CHEM101 with specific parameters: instance name 'Lab Safety Self-Enrollment', enrollment key 'ChemFall2025', maximum 30 enrolled users, and 180-day enrollment duration (15,552,000 seconds). All metadata values are correctly specified and align with Moodle database schema: password field stores enrollment key, customint3 stores max users, enrolperiod stores duration in seconds, and name field stores custom instance name. The values are realistic for a semester-long chemistry course with limited enrollment capacity. Data is synthetic (created for this task).
